status_detail: 476B SSE envelope accepted without protocol error. No INVALID_JSON, no ERR_HTTP2. But warning text NOT rendered — chat is completely blank (no user message, no AI response, no error). The completion request returned 200/h2. SSE format was silently consumed but produced no visible DOM content. Significant improvement over #484 (249B → INVALID_JSON error) but still no visible warning.

details.user_facing_error: NONE — chat is completely blank, no error message shown
details.chat_state: Blank — no user message bubble, no AI response, no error text. Input field empty (message was sent). URL changed to new chat session.

comparison_with_484.step1_249B: INVALID_JSON error → network error message shown to user
comparison_with_484.step2_476B: No JS error at all → chat blank, SSE silently consumed
comparison_with_484.conclusion: Larger envelope (476B) avoids JSON parse error but warning content still not rendered in DeepSeek UI
